title: Release
description: Represents a deployed version of an application.

id.description: The unique identifier of the release.

version.description: The version string of the release.

builder_name.description: The name of the person or system that created the build.

release_source.description: The source of the release information.

source_control.description: Source control information for the release.

revision.description: The commit hash or revision identifier.

build_time.description: The date and time the build was created.

errors_introduced_count.description: The number of new errors introduced in this release.

errors_seen_count.description: The total number of errors seen in this release.

sessions_count.description: The total number of sessions for this release.

unhandled_sessions_count.description: The number of sessions with unhandled errors.

accumulative_daily_users_seen.description: The cumulative number of daily active users.

accumulative_daily_users_with_unhandled.description: The cumulative number of daily users with unhandled errors.

created_at.description: The date and time the release record was created.
